hero.title: Ibikorwa vy'ugushikira abanyagihugu
hero.lead: Urwo rutonde ruratanga urutonde rw'ibikorwa rusangi bikorwa n'ishirahamwe IATF.

intro: Ibikorwa vyemewe birerekanwa ngaha bimaze gusohorwa.

header.title: Guhindura ikintu c'ukuri gikenewe mu bijanye n'ugushikira abantu mu mugambi w'abanyagihugu

paragraphs: Ishirahamwe IATF rirasuzuma ibikenewe vy'ukuri mu bijanye n'ukworoherezwa gushobora guhindurwa mu buryo bw'ibikoresho vy'ubuhinga bwa none bikoreshwa n'abantu benshi.

emptyState.title: Nta migambi irashirwa ahabona
paragraphs: IATF iriko irategura integuro yayo ya mbere y'igikorwa ca bose.
Urashobora kurungika icegeranyo mu gihe ufise ivyo ukeneye vy'ukuri mu bijanye n'ukworoherwa.
